notes: Canonical architecture guidance now lives in docs/architecture/architecture-overview.md.
Root ARCHITECTURE.md remains only as a repository pointer.
Storage, docs publishing, CLI classification, and verification claims were reconciled with current framework behavior.
README start-here guidance was updated for new users and contributors.
Packagist scaffold commands now match the real new <target> flow.
Docs continue to distinguish canonical framework docs from website rendering/publishing.
Top-level help remains the canonical CLI index.
Grouped help now works for inspect, verify, and generate command families.
Exact per-command help continues to work for fully qualified commands.
The first-run path now reads scaffold -> help -> compile -> inspect -> verify -> serve.
Scaffolded next-step output and scaffolded README guidance were aligned with that path.
Example guidance points new users to examples/hello-world first.
Contributor docs now point directly to architecture, CLI metadata, compiler, docs generation, and scaffold entry files.
Canonical docs and generated/published docs boundaries remain explicit.
